steps.title: Spot the key contrast
steps.content: The notes establish a single decisive contrast: Paul Fejos's The Last Moment is lost (no copies exist), while Oscar Micheaux's Within Our Gates is archived and preserved at UCLA. This is the difference the question asks to emphasize.

steps.title: Match the choice that highlights this contrast
steps.content:
Choice A directly uses “While” to contrast “lost to history” against “archived,” emphasizing the key difference between the two films' fates.

B treats the films as similar examples rather than emphasizing their difference, while C and D each mention only one film, preventing any comparison.

This matches choice A — A is correct.
